nodes.name: Hispaniolan moist forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan moist forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo、Bay-breasted cuckoo、Hispaniolan nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: Hispaniolan nightjar
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan nightjar（Hispaniolan nightjar，学名 Antrostomus ekmani），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括外来捕食者。

nodes.name: Hispaniolan pine forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan pine forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo、中美夜鹰、Hispaniolan nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hispaniolan dry forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan dry forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Bay-breasted cuckoo、中美夜鹰、Hispaniolan nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It mostly inhabits broadleaf forests at middle elevations, as well as low elevation thorn scrub and higher elevation pine forest

links.evidence: It mostly inhabits broadleaf forests at middle elevations, as well as low elevation thorn scrub and higher elevation pine forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Though its population is unknown, it is believed to be stable, and no immediate threats have been identified. However, "destruction of habitat undoubtably would affect this species, and introduced predators also are a potential threat."
